# Little Loutra

> Private seaside apartment in Loutraki Perachora, Greece. One bedroom, private balcony, sleeps up to 4. Two minutes from the sea, one hour from Athens.

## Key facts

- Location: Mpoleti 6, Loutraki 20300, Greece (Corinthian Gulf, Perachora peninsula)
- Coordinates: 37.994248, 22.923831
- Capacity: up to 4 guests
- Bedrooms: 1
- Check-in: 15:00
- Check-out: 11:00
- Minimum stay: 2 nights
- Parking: free, directly in front of the building
- Pets: small, well-behaved pets welcome on request
- Cancellation: free up to 14 days before arrival
- Distance to sea: 2 minutes on foot
- Distance to Athens: ~1 hour by car
- Distance to Athens International Airport: ~1 hour by car
- Towels and bed linen: provided on arrival
- Car rental: partner discount voucher with Avance Car Rental sent after reservation
- Amenities: fiber Wi-Fi, air conditioning, full kitchen, private balcony

## Languages

- English: https://littleloutra.com/
- Greek (Ελληνικά): https://littleloutra.com/el/
- Czech (Čeština): https://littleloutra.com/cs/
- German (Deutsch): https://littleloutra.com/de/

## Positioning

Little Loutra is not a hotel. It is a private apartment run by its owners, intended for travelers who want quiet and direct sea access without the scale or staff of a resort. The nearby town Loutraki is known for its natural thermal springs (ιαματικές πηγές), a feature that distinguishes the destination from generic Greek island stays.

## Contact

- Email: stay@littleloutra.com
- Phone: +30 695 564 4151
- Reservations: https://littleloutra.com/#book

## Booking

Dates and guest count are requested via the reservation form at https://littleloutra.com/#book. The owners respond with a custom quote, typically within a few hours. A Booking.com listing is also available when present.

## Structured data

- Schema.org LodgingBusiness + FAQPage are inlined on every locale page.
- Sitemap: https://littleloutra.com/sitemap.xml
